qualifier: [commanded relief force sent to retake Nightsong during Fowler invasion]
evidence_snippet: When word reached Oldtown, Addam was sent by his father with a strong force to retake the castle.

qualifier: [Garmon is Addam's younger brother, killed in Dornish counter-attack]
evidence_snippet: a second Dornish force had come down to attack the city, burning fields, farms and villages nearby, killing Addam's younger brother Garmon in battle.

qualifier: [militarily opposed House Fowler's invasion of the Reach during the First Dornish War]

qualifier: [as Lord of the High Tower; target node has type:event.war but is a character — see infrastructure question q-2026-05-17-characters-house-hightower-a-j-002]

qualifier: [sent to retake Nightsong from House Fowler during First Dornish War]
